summary_text: Add **exactly one** new case in each file right after the existing `content-compare-non-final` block. - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-orchestrator-nl-hints.sh` (insert after current line `353`, before line `355`): ```bash assert_content "content-compare-notebooklm-slide-prep" \ "notebooklm-slide-prep" "notebooklm-slide-prep" "true" "notebooklm-slide-prep" "notebooklm-slide-prep" "" "" "off" "" \ --text "notebooklm でスライド下書きを2案比較して選びたい" ``` - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/tests/test-orchestrator-nl-hints.sh` (insert after current line `299`, before line `301`): ```bash assert_content "content-compare-notebooklm-slide-prep" \ "slide-deck" "slide" "true" "slide-deck" "slide" "" "" "off" "" \ --text "notebooklm でスライド下書きを2案比較して選びたい" ``` This is a single non-final compare guard for NotebookLM slide-prep phrasing: - compares flag triggered (`...2案比較...`) - final compare remains off (`compare_mode "off"`, no required artifacts) - feed-runner and main diverge only where they parse NotebookLM slide-prep (main supports dedicated action).
